        <div data-pjax="true" data-test-selector="body-content" data-view-component="true" class="markdown-body tmp-my-3"><h1>Fish Audio S2 — Pre-Release</h1>
<blockquote>
<p>Best text-to-speech system among both open source and closed source.</p>
</blockquote>
<p>Trained on <strong>10M+ hours</strong> of audio across <strong>~50 languages</strong>, S2 combines a <strong>Dual-AR architecture</strong> (Qwen3 backbone) with <strong>GRPO reinforcement learning alignment</strong> to produce natural, emotionally rich speech with fine-grained inline control.</p>
<p><a href="https://github.com/fishaudio/fish-speech/blob/main/FishAudioS2TecReport.pdf">Technical Report</a> · <a href="https://fish.audio/blog/fish-audio-open-sources-s2/" rel="nofollow">Blog</a> · <a href="https://huggingface.co/fishaudio/s2-pro" rel="nofollow">Model</a> · <a href="https://fish.audio/" rel="nofollow">Playground</a></p>
<h2>Model</h2>
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Variant</th>
<th>Params</th>
<th>Codec</th>
<th>Output</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>S2-Pro</td>
<td>4B (slow) + 400M (fast)</td>
<td>ModifiedDAC, 10 codebooks, ~21 Hz</td>
<td>44.1 kHz</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
<h2>Highlights</h2>
<ul>
<li><strong>Dual-AR</strong>: Slow AR (4B) predicts semantic codebook along time axis; Fast AR (400M) fills 9 residual codebooks per step</li>
<li><strong>Inline Control</strong>: Free-form tags like <code>[laugh]</code>, <code>[whispers]</code>, <code>[super happy]</code> at word level</li>
<li><strong>RL Alignment</strong>: GRPO with unified data-reward pipeline — same model for data filtering and RL reward</li>
<li><strong>SGLang Streaming</strong>: RTF 0.195, TTFA ~100ms, 3000+ tokens/s on single H200</li>
<li><strong>50+ Languages</strong>, multi-speaker (<code><|speaker:i|></code>), multi-turn, rapid voice cloning (10-30s reference)</li>
</ul>
<h2>What's Changed</h2>
<p><strong>Model & Inference</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>New Dual-AR architecture with Qwen3 backbone, replacing Fish-Speech v1.5</li>
<li>New <code>ModifiedDAC</code> audio codec (replaces Firefly/VQ-GAN)</li>
<li>Support <code>fish_qwen3_omni</code> checkpoint format (sharded safetensors) with backward compatibility</li>
<li>Fixed: torch.compile bugs, GPU memory leak, audio quality issues</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Docker & Deployment</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Docker overhaul: multi-target builds, compose support, health checks, non-root user</li>
<li>SGLang server integration</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>API & Server</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Reference voice management API (CRUD), multipart upload support</li>
<li>Various server bug fixes, <code>/health</code> endpoint</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Finetune</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>Full finetune pipeline for S1/S2 (datasets, training, LoRA merge)</li>
</ul>
<p><strong>Docs & Infra</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>README & MkDocs rewritten for S2 across 6 languages</li>
<li>License updated to Fish Audio Research License</li>
<li>Removed legacy code (Firefly VQ-GAN, SenseVoice, Fish Agent, old batch files)</li>
</ul></div>
</div>
